COMMERCIAL LEASE AGREEMENT

This Lease Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of January 1, 2025,
by and between:

LANDLORD: Northstar Properties Inc. (EIN 55-6123456)
Address: 200 Broadway, Suite 1400, New York, NY 10038

TENANT: Summit Consulting LLC (EIN 12-3456789)
Address: 450 Park Avenue, Suite 800, New York, NY 10022

SECTION 1. PREMISES
Landlord hereby leases to Tenant office space consisting of approximately
1,200 square feet located at 450 Park Avenue, Suite 800, New York, NY 10022
("Premises").

SECTION 2. TERM
The lease term shall commence on January 1, 2025 and shall expire on
December 31, 2027, unless terminated earlier pursuant to the terms herein.

SECTION 3. RENT
Tenant shall pay monthly rent of $8,500.00 plus applicable taxes, due on
the first day of each month. Annual rent escalation of 3% applies.

SECTION 4. SECURITY DEPOSIT
Tenant shall deposit $17,000.00 (two months' rent) upon execution.

SECTION 5. TERMINATION
Either party may terminate this Agreement upon six (6) months' prior
written notice to the other party. Early termination fee of $25,500.00
(three months' rent) applies if terminated within the first 12 months.

SECTION 6. GOVERNING LAW
This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of New York.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement.

_________________________        _________________________
Robert Chen                      Maria Vasquez
CEO, Northstar Properties Inc.   Managing Partner, Summit Consulting LLC
Date: December 15, 2024          Date: December 18, 2024
